intended_use: SubtleMR is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head, spine, neck and knee MRI, or increase image sharpness for
intended_use_full: SubtleMR is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head, spine, neck and knee MRI, or increase image sharpness for non-contrast enhanced head MRI.
ground_truth: Comparison of enhanced images to original MRI images using SNR measurements and Likert scale assessment of structure visibility and sharpness
other_metrics: Noise reduction test: signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) improved by greater than or equal to 5% on average; visibility of small structures changed by less than or equal to 0.5 Likert scale points. Sharpness increase test: anatomic structure thickness and boundary sharpness improved in at least 90% of test datasets.
